overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic game showing a character in a trench coat walking along a ruined riverside promenade. The character passes by a large Ferris wheel and continues along a stone walkway next to a high fortress wall in an overcast, desolate urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown riverside path beneath willow trees

events.description: emerges from dense vegetation onto paved riverside promenade

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and under low-hanging willow branches toward the waterfront

entered.detail: massive tree trunk with hanging branches dominating the left side of the frame
tall grass and bushes encroaching on the path
calm water reflecting the overcast sky
ornate stone balustrade separating the path from the water
post-apocalyptic city buildings visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dense overgrowth beneath a large willow tree, emerging onto a riverside path. The stone embankment railing becomes visible as the vegetation thins, revealing a view of the ruined city across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside promenade with amusement park Ferris wheel

events.description: exits tree cover into open overcast sky, increasing ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade with the Ferris wheel visible across the river

entered.detail: large white Ferris wheel with enclosed cabins, partially rusted
black Victorian-style street lamp with decorative base
weathered wooden seating along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open riverside promenade where a massive Ferris wheel dominates the left skyline. Ornate cast-iron lampposts line the right side of the path as the character moves away from the overgrown area into the open.

events.description: passes the Ferris wheel which moves behind the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway passing ruined wooden structures and benches

entered.detail: collapsed wooden structure with broken beams and debris
massive gray stone wall with weathered blocks rising on the right

segments.scene_description: The character passes the Ferris wheel and approaches a ruined wooden shelter on the right. A high stone fortress wall becomes visible on the right side, replacing the open view of the city as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress wall walkway with distant figures

events.description: distant human figures become visible walking ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the high stone wall approaching distant figures in the path ahead

notable_agents.action: distant figures walking along the same path ahead

entered.detail: small group of figures walking away in the distance
intact wooden bench beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the imposing high stone fortress wall on the right, with the Ferris wheel now far behind. Distant figures appear ahead on the path, walking in the same direction, while the camera continues along the cracked pavement toward them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, overgrown riverside thicket into a desolate urban promenade flanked by imposing ruins. It begins with the character pushing through dense vegetation beneath a large willow tree, emerging onto a stone embankment that reveals a view of a ruined city across the water. As the character moves into the open, the scene expands to show a massive Ferris wheel dominating the skyline to the left and ornate cast-iron lampposts lining the path to the right. The perspective then shifts as the character passes the Ferris wheel and a ruined wooden shelter, with a high stone fortress wall gradually replacing the open city view. Finally, the camera follows the character along the cracked pavement of the fortress wall, moving away from the distant wheel toward figures appearing ahead on the path.
